description: Style Note This T-shirt from adidas comes with simple styling and print. To be casually worn, made from soft fabric, this is just the kind of live-in T-shirt that's perfect to wear on a fun day out. Pair this tee with jeans and sneakers and accessorise your look by wearing a funky belt. Product Details White T-shirt, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, Adidas printed in front and a brand patch above the hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use cool iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
